zh.Saint Botolph's Church, Chevening, Seven: 英國英格蘭肯特設維寧聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Perkins於1513年1月10日出生在英國肯特設維寧時，她的父親John Richard Perkins33歲，母親Anne Annesley33歲。她於1560年1月13日與William Leonard在英國肯特艾登布利其結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1585年10月26日在她的家鄉享年72歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特設維寧聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.Saint Botolph's Church, Chevening, Seven: 英国英格兰肯特設維寧聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Perkins于1513年1月10日出生在英国肯特設維寧时，她的父亲John Richard Perkins33岁，母亲Anne Annesley33岁。她于1560年1月13日与William Leonard在英国肯特艾登布利其结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1585年10月26日在她的家乡享年72岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特設維寧聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇。

variants.name: Parkins
meanings: Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish names.

variants.name: Perkin
meanings: Probably an Americanized form of Swiss German Bürgin (see Burgy ).

nameMeanings.name: Ann

meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Perkins was born on 10 January 1513, in Chevening, Kent, England, her father, John Richard Perkins, was 33 and her mother, Anne Annesley, was 33. She married William Leonard on 13 January 1560, in Edenbridge, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 26 October 1585, in her hometown, at the age of 72, and was buried in St Botolph's Church, Chevening, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Saint Botolph's Church, Chevening, Seven: St Botolph's Church, Chevening, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Perkins est née le 10 janvier 1513, à Chevening, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Richard Perkins, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Anne Annesley, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé William Leonard le 13 janvier 1560, à Edenbridge, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 26 octobre 1585, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à St Botolph's Church, Chevening, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Saint Botolph's Church, Chevening, Seven: St Botolph's Church, Chevening, Kent, England, United Kingdom

Januar 1560 in Edenbridge, Kent, England William Leonard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 26. Oktober 1585 im Alter von 72 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in St Botolph's Church, Chevening, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato William Leonard il 13 gennaio 1560, nel Edenbridge, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 ottobre 1585, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a St Botolph's Church, Chevening, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Perkinsが1513年1月10日にイギリスケントチェベニングで生まれた時，父John Richard Perkinsは33歳，母Anne Annesleyは33歳であった。1560年1月13日にイギリスケントイーデンブリッジでWilliam Leonardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1585年10月26日に故郷で72歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントチェベニングスト ボトルフ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Botolph's Church, Chevening, Seven: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 처베닝 스트 벗프'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Ann Perkins(이)가 1513년 1월 10일 영국 켄트 처베닝에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Richard Perkins(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Annesley(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1560년 1월 13일 영국 켄트 에덴브리지에서 William Leonard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1585년 10월 26일 그녀의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 처베닝 스트 벗프'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Perkins nasceu em 10 de janeiro de 1513, em Chevening, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Richard Perkins, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Anne Annesley, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com William Leonard em 13 de janeiro de 1560, em Edenbridge, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 26 de outubro de 1585, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em St Botolph's Church, Chevening, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Botolph's Church, Chevening, Seven: ст ботолф'с чурч, чевенинг, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Perkins родилась 10 января 1513 г. в местности чевенинг, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени John Richard Perkins было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Annesley, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Leonard 13 января 1560 г. в местности эденбридж, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 26 октября 1585 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности ст ботолф'с чурч, чевенинг, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
